name: Tamron Lens 11-20mm f/2.8 Di III-A RXD For Canon RF
description: The dynamic 11-20mm F/2.8 Di III-A2 RXD Lens from Tamron is a fast-aperture ultra wide-angle zoom lens for Canon RF-mount APS-C mirrorless cameras. It features a fast and constant f/2.8 maximum aperture and has a compact and lightweight design.

features.Key Features: APS-C | f/2.8 to f/16 | 18-32mm (35mm Equivalent) | Fast Ultra-Wide Angle Zoom | Rapid eXtra Silent Stepping Drive Motor | 1x XLD, 2x GM Asph., and 2x LD Elements | BBAR-G2 Lens Coating | Weather-Sealed Construction | Rounded 7-Blade Diaphragm
features.What’s In The Box: Tamron 11-20mm f/2.8 Di III-A RXD Lens (Canon RF) | Lens Hood | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap
